summary: Small PL subsystem decomp-matching slice split from #2617. The only changed file was src/melee/pl/pltrick.c, where local Fighter* declaration order in pl_80038144 was changed by moving attacker_fp after victim_fp. The decomp-dev bot reported one unmatched-item improvement for main/melee/pl/pltrick::pl_80038144, +5 bytes, from 98.26% to 98.73%. No human review comments were present in the loaded slice.

smart_moves.text: Included local hygiene evidence for the slice: created from origin/master as an isolated path slice and git diff --check passed.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For MWCC matching work, local declaration order can be a narrow, evidence-backed lever for improving a specific function's score, but it should be tied to automated diff evidence rather than generalized as style.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Reorder local pointer declarations to influence matching/codegen for a single function.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The PR moved attacker_fp below victim_fp in pl_80038144 and the bot reported a +5 byte unmatched-item improvement for that symbol.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Fighter* attacker_fp moved after Fighter* victim_fp
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The evidence supports only this local improvement, not a global declaration-order rule.

notes: The diff evidence is complete and very small: one added line and one deleted line in one hunk.
The per-PR decomp-dev report provides narrow score evidence for pl_80038144.

The broader preliminary report in the PR body describes the full unsplit source branch and explicitly says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative for the slice; therefore broad branch metrics are not treated as proof of this slice's exact effect.
No human review comments or reviewer intent were present in the loaded slice.
No build logs, objdiff details, or adjacent-function checks beyond the bot summary were loaded.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Local declaration order tweak improved pl_80038144 score
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2628, src/melee/pl/pltrick.c changed only the order of Fighter* local declarations in pl_80038144, moving attacker_fp after victim_fp. The decomp-dev bot reported main/melee/pl/pltrick::pl_80038144 improved by +5 bytes from 98.26% to 98.73%. Treat this as a narrow evidence-backed matching tactic, not a global naming or style rule.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR body's full unsplit branch metrics as this slice's exact result; the body itself says per-PR CI/decomp-dev reporting is authoritative for the slice.
Do not infer a global convention that victim_fp should always be declared before attacker_fp; the evidence only shows one local declaration-order adjustment.
Do not claim pl_80038144 fully matched; the bot report shows an improvement to 98.73%, not a completed match.
